fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo

Package
Description
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.application.meteo
 
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.application.meteo.filters
 
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo
 
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.impl
 
  • Classes in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo used by fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.application.meteo
    Class
    Description
    MeteoAlertI
    The interface MeteoAlertI defines the signatures of methods to be implemented by meteo alerts emitted by meteo stations.
    MeteoAlertI.Level
    The enumeration Level defines the standard levels used in meteo alerts.
    PositionI
    The interface PositionI declares the signatures of methods that a position must implement.
    WindDataI
    The interface WindDataI declares the signatures of methods to be implemented by wind data classes.

    Class
    Description
    PositionI
    The interface PositionI declares the signatures of methods that a position must implement.
  • Classes in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo used by fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo
    Class
    Description
    MeteoAlertI.AlertType
    The class AlterType defines the standard meteo alerts.
    MeteoAlertI.AlertTypeI
    The interface AlertTypeI defines the type of meteo alerts.
    MeteoAlertI.Level
    The enumeration Level defines the standard levels used in meteo alerts.
    MeteoAlertI.LevelI
    The interface LevelI defines the type for levels in meteo alerts.
    PositionI
    The interface PositionI declares the signatures of methods that a position must implement.
    RegionI
    The interface RegionI
